messages.content:
Your task is to select one (1) Record ID based on what Category would be the best fit for the News Article.

You are given a list of Categories. Your task is then to pick the best category for the news story, and output the Record ID.

You only output the record ID and nothing else.

Info about the News Article=
{{substring(13.data.data.records[].fields.Article; 0; 1000)}}

messages.content:
Your task is to create a new title for a news article.
You are given the original title, the first part of the article, and an instruction on how to write the new title.

Never wrap the title in quotation marks.
You output the title and nothing else.

[Title Writing Instructions]=
{{7.data.data.records[1].fields.`Prompt Template`}}



Even though your system inputs are in "English" you will always use the language "{{6.data.data.records[].fields.`Article Language`}}" as your written output language. You will use the grammatically correct spelling for {{6.data.data.records[].fields.`Article Language`}}.

------
You never use any of the words from the [Avoid Words List].

[Avoid Words List]=
{{6.data.data.records[].fields.`Avoid Words`}}

messages.content:
Your task is to re-write the given [Org News Article] by following the [Re-Write Writing Instruction].

You never include any CTAs or any author info from the [Org News Article].

Formate the article using Markdown.
Never add H1 title.
NEVER reference the original source of the news article if any is given.
Output the new re-written article and nothing else.

You always use approximatly the same amount of words as used in the [Org News Article].

You never use h2 or h3 titles. Write it as a news story.
You never add a conclusion or in summary at the end. News storries just end. 

Even though your system inputs are in "English" you will always use the language "{{6.data.data.records[].fields.`Article Language`}}" as your written output language. You will use the grammatically correct spelling for {{6.data.data.records[].fields.`Article Language`}}.

------
You never use any of the words from the [Avoid Words List].

[Avoid Words List]=
{{6.data.data.records[].fields.`Avoid Words`}}

Please re-write the [Org News Article] by following the [Re-Write Writing Instruction].

Never include any CTAs or any author info from the [Org News Article].

Formate the article in Markdown
Output the new re-written article and nothing else.
Never add H1 title.
NEVER reference the original source of the news article if any is given.
Always use approximatly the same amount of words as used in the [Org News Article].

[Re-Write Writing Instruction]=
{{7.data.data.records[2].fields.`Prompt Template`}}


[Org News Article]=
Approximate word count: {{length(split(13.data.data.records[].fields.Article; space))}} Words

{{13.data.data.records[].fields.Article}}
